title: asperula cynanchica subsp. rumelica
intro: Asperula cynanchica subsp. rumelica, also known as Balkan woodruff, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Balkan woodruff include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and even exhibit antimicrobial activity against certain bacteria and viruses. Balkan woodruff can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in herbal remedies to support digestive health and immune function.
